business.description:
Tripadvisor (NasdaqGS:TRIP) has announced that Chair Greg B. Maffei will retire from the Board at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.
Board member Albert E. Rosenthaler will also retire at the same 2026 meeting and will not stand for re-election.
The company stated that these decisions were not related to any disagreement with Tripadvisor.

science.title: Gravitational Waves Leave Imprints On Light Emitted By Atoms
science.description: Gravitational waves are ripples in spacetime produced by violent cosmic events, such as the merging of black holes. So far, direct detections have relied on measuring tiny distance changes over kilometer-scale instruments. ai.title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says
ai.description: Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system will become an official program of record, Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg ​said in a letter to Pentagon leaders, a move ​that locks in long-term use of Palantir's weapons-targeting technology across the US military.

ai.title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says
ai.description: The US military is officially adopting Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system. This move secures long-term use of the technology for weapons targeting. Maven analyzes battlefield data to identify threats. The system will be integrated across all military branches. This decision aims to enhance warfighting capabilities and decision-making. The program is expected to be fully implemented by September.

ai.title: The revolution shall be tokenised: Inside the hacker homes incubating India’s AI future
ai.description: In Bengaluru, hacker houses like The Residency are turning into live-in labs where young developers build AI startups while living together. Backed by active VC interest, these spaces and evolving hackathons are shaping a new generation of full-stack builders focused on real-world products, experimentation, and launching ideas into businesses.
